calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE / Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Apr-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Adrian G. Driscoll, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, Tel. 415.788.1900, appearing in person for petitioner;
Preet Kaur, Esq. of CalPERS, Tel. 916.795.1054, appearing via Zoom for respondents for California Public Employees' Retirement System CalPERS, The Board of Administration of the California Public Employees' Retirement System, and Its Executive Officer, and Deputy Executive Officer.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER DINA BITTON's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

Matter argued and submitted.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Bitton's petition for writ of administrative mandamus is granted.

(See Word minutes for details.)

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Bailiff: Jamie; Not Reported. (302/RCE)

MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE / Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Continued to April 26, 2024 to be heard by Judge East; Judge Ulmer earlier recused.
